title: Michael Schlosser
text: Home * People * Michael Schlosser Michael Schlosser [1] Michael Schlosser , a German computer engineer and scientist, alumnus of the Chemnitz University of Technology with research interests in artificial intelligence , fuzzy logic and computer chess. Since 1996, Michael Schlosser is associate professor at Koblenz University of Applied Sciences [2] , Department of Electrical Engineering. He is also recognized chess composer [3] [4] .
